content.text: 1. The Core Essence of Health & Disease

This detailed secondary tutorial is engineered to cover the complete syllabus for JSS 1 / Year 7 Basic Science in the Second Term. We explore critical formulas, diagrams, properties, and step-by-step applications.
Academic Standard: Vetted by HMG Academy concepts curriculum experts to ensure seamless compatibility with national secondary requirements.

content.question: Which of the following is true regarding Health & Disease?
options: It is a core secondary concept
It is only an elective study
content.explanation: Health & Disease is a core academic pillar within the standard Junior Secondary syllabus.
